note: Site IDs listed here are excluded from the dashboard (grid + map + status counts + dropdowns) but their workflows still run and their data files still update in the repo. Direct URLs like site.html?site=<id> still work — hiding is a default-view choice, not a permission. To hide a site: add its site_id string (e.g. "bimbo-nrg") to the array and push. To unhide: remove it. Reload the dashboard to see the change.
